Smoke Test Document
===================

This is a minimal plain-text document used by the smoke test suite to verify
the document upload pipeline (Lambda document store, issue #14).

Institution: Test University
Department: Admissions
Year: 2024

Key policies:
- All applicants must submit official transcripts
- Test scores are optional for the 2024-2025 cycle
- Deadline for early decision is November 1

This file is intentionally small to keep test latency low.
